founding.title: A straightforward shop model.
paragraphs: No owner or founder was explicitly identified in the supplied sources, so the site keeps the story focused on the shop experience rather than making assumptions about ownership.
The booking process is handled through Square, and the service philosophy stays centered on making each visit clear, convenient, and easy to plan.

standard.title: The East Quarter
paragraphs: A good appointment should be simple to schedule and easy to trust.
The site is designed to highlight the essentials: location, booking, contact, and a polished shop atmosphere.
